label: Phase 7 visual review pass — sky brighter, vignette softer, caustic spread wider, lvc lifted
notes: displaceweight confirmed at 0.025 via .eval() — expression was correct. Rectangular artifact likely viewer framing. All shader/level changes tuned from first-render review.

operations.note: light falloff exp(-r*2.2)*1.4 → exp(-r*1.5)*2.2; bloom 5.0*0.8 → 3.5*1.2; bloomR 0.25→0.30; lightCore (0.55,0.72,0.80)→(0.65,0.85,0.92); lightCore threshold smoothstep(0.6,1.0)→(0.4,0.95); midTeal lifted slightly
caustic vignette smoothstep(0.2,0.9) → smoothstep(0.6,1.2) — caustics now fill full frame instead of ringed border
midpoint pos 0.55→0.72, gray 0.55→0.85 — softer, wider falloff
